headline: Assessing Copart (CPRT) Valuation After A Year Of Weak Share Performance
summary: Recent share performance and what it might mean for investors Copart (CPRT) has drawn attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. See our latest analysis for Copart. At the latest share price of $33.02, Copart’s recent 30 day and year to date share price returns indicate fading momentum. This aligns with a 1 year total shareholder return of a 42.54% decline and a modest...
